howItWorks.intro: This crypto portfolio rebalance calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Trade Amount = (Target % - Current %) x Portfolio Value
Total Traded = Sum of absolute trades / 2
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: How often should I rebalance my crypto portfolio?
faq.answer: Most strategies rebalance monthly, quarterly, or when allocations drift more than 5% from targets. Frequent rebalancing incurs more fees and tax events. Threshold-based rebalancing (only when drift exceeds 5-10%) is often more efficient.

faq.question: Does rebalancing improve returns?
faq.answer: Rebalancing primarily manages risk by preventing overexposure to volatile assets. It forces a buy-low-sell-high discipline. Studies show rebalancing can improve risk-adjusted returns by 0.5-1.5% annually in diversified portfolios.

faq.question: Is the Crypto Portfolio Rebalance Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard cryptocurrency and blockchain formulas trusted by crypto investors and traders. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What total portfolio value should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate total portfolio value value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Crypto Portfolio Rebalance Calculator?
sections.body: The Crypto Portfolio Rebalance Calculator is a free online tool designed for crypto investors and traders who need quick, accurate calculations in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space. By entering your total portfolio value, current btc %, current eth %, you get instant results including btc trade, eth trade, alt trade. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting btc trade right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cryptocurrency and blockchain, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by crypto investors and traders worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to evaluate your crypto portfolio with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your total portfolio value and need to find the right btc trade. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Total Portfolio Value ($)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your total portfolio value — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: current btc %, current eth %, current alt %, target btc %, target eth %, target alt %. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your btc trade, eth trade, alt trade. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your total portfolio value before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both btc trade and eth trade — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to evaluate your crypto portfolio.
If you're unsure about your target alt %, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
